mapper.select: /* selectAdmin1001 */ SELECT d.dept_oid, d.dept_nm, d.up_dept_oid, p.dept_nm as parent_name, d.sort_seq, d.use_yn, d.reg_id, d.reg_dt, d.mdfcn_id, d.mdfcn_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.dept_mmbr dm WHERE dm.dept_oid = d.dept_oid) as member_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.dept c WHERE c.up_dept_oid = d.dept_oid AND c.use_yn = 'Y') as child_count FROM ${schema}.dept d LEFT JOIN ${schema}.dept p ON d.up_dept_oid = p.dept_oid WHERE d.dept_oid = #{deptOid}

/* selectAdmin1001Tree */ SELECT d.dept_oid, d.dept_nm, d.up_dept_oid, d.sort_seq, d.use_yn, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.dept_mmbr dm WHERE dm.dept_oid = d.dept_oid) as member_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.dept c WHERE c.up_dept_oid = d.dept_oid AND c.use_yn = 'Y') as child_count FROM ${schema}.dept d WHERE d.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE WHEN d.up_dept_oid IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, d.up_dept_oid, d.sort_seq, d.dept_oid
mapper.insert: /* insertAdmin1001 */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.dept (dept_nm, up_dept_oid, sort_seq, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt) VALUES (#{deptNm}, #{upDeptOid}, #{sortSeq}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: /* updateAdmin1001 */ UPDATE ${schema}.dept SET dept_nm = #{deptNm}, up_dept_oid = #{upDeptOid}, sort_seq = #{sortSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE dept_oid = #{deptOid}

/* deleteAdmin1001 */ UPDATE ${schema}.dept SET use_yn = 'N', mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE dept_oid IN
#{id}
